Local governments choose the maximum dollar amount of the exemption, which can range from $6,000 to $30,000 (or $50,000 for localities with high appreciation). Exemption amount equals one-half of the vet's disability rating multiplied by a maximum benefit chosen by the local government, which can range from $30,000 to $150,000 (or $200,000 for localities with high appreciation). That means the exemption falls between $1,500 (1/2 x 10% x 30,000) and $75,000 (1/2 x 100% x 150,000) (With a higher range for localities with high appreciation). Local application deadline is usually Mar 1.
